requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (Southern Africa Ecosystem)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（南部非洲体系）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（南部非洲體系）

summary.en: Botswana follows the Southern African IEC 62196 connector ecosystem. As a right-hand-drive country aligned with South Africa's electrical infrastructure, Botswana's EV charging deployments use IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) couplers for AC charging and the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF, for DC fast charging. This alignment mirrors neighbouring South Africa (SANS 62196 series, which adopts IEC 62196) and the broader Southern African Power Pool (SAPP) region, which consistently deploys IEC 62196 connector infrastructure. BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) is the national standards body and adopts IEC standards by reference; no Botswana-specific alternative connector standard has been published. The nascent state of Botswana's EV market means connector specifications for deployed and planned public infrastructure largely follow IEC 62196 as the de facto regional standard. CHAdeMO connectors may appear on some multi-standard units but are not the primary standard for the region.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳遵循南部非洲IEC 62196接口体系。作为与南非电气基础设施接轨的右驾国家，博茨瓦纳电动汽车充电部署采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器进行交流充电，以及IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）进行直流快充。这与邻国南非（SANS 62196系列，采用IEC 62196）以及广泛部署IEC 62196接口基础设施的南部非洲电力池（SAPP）地区一致。BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）是国家标准机构，通过引用方式采用IEC标准；未见博茨瓦纳发布任何特有的替代接口标准。博茨瓦纳电动汽车市场尚处于起步阶段，已部署和规划中的公共基础设施接口规范基本遵循IEC 62196作为事实区域标准。部分多标准设备可能包含CHAdeMO接口，但其不是该地区的主要标准。
summary.zht: 波札那遵循南部非洲IEC 62196接口體系。作為與南非電氣基礎設施接軌的右駕國家，波札那電動汽車充電部署採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器進行交流充電，以及IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）進行直流快充。這與鄰國南非（SANS 62196系列，採用IEC 62196）以及廣泛部署IEC 62196接口基礎設施的南部非洲電力池（SAPP）地區一致。BOBS（波札那標準局）是國家標準機構，通過引用方式採用IEC標準；未見波札那發布任何特有的替代接口標準。波札那電動汽車市場尚處於起步階段，已部署和規劃中的公共基礎設施接口規範基本遵循IEC 62196作為事實區域標準。部分多標準設備可能包含CHAdeMO接口，但其不是該地區的主要標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
SANS 62196 series (South Africa) — adopted IEC 62196, indicative of Southern Africa regional connector alignment
BOBS conformity framework — adopts IEC standards by reference

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets deployed in Botswana and Southern Africa. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, which is incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. A GB/T-only charger physically cannot serve vehicles with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 inlets — the dominant vehicle standard for right-hand-drive markets in the region.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，与博茨瓦纳及南部非洲部署的IEC 62196车辆接口在物理和电气层面不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。仅支持GB/T的充电桩在物理上无法为采用IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2接口的车辆充电——这是该地区右驾市场的主流车辆标准。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，與波札那及南部非洲部署的IEC 62196車輛接口在物理和電氣層面不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。僅支持GB/T的充電樁在物理上無法為採用IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2接口的車輛充電——這是該地區右駕市場的主流車輛標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 deployments in Botswana. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 for CCS2), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence adapted to Botswana ambient conditions, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm the connector type required by the specific Botswana site owner, operator, or procurement specification before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于博茨瓦纳的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（CCS2需从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24）、标签、测试报告、适配博茨瓦纳环境条件的温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前须确认具体博茨瓦纳场地业主、运营商或采购规范所要求的接口类型。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於波札那的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（CCS2需從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24）、標籤、測試報告、適配波札那環境條件的溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前須確認具體波札那場地業主、運營商或採購規範所要求的接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by site owner, operator, or procurement specification; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; Botswana follows the Southern Africa IEC 62196 ecosystem and no alternative national connector standard has been published
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Botswana follows the Southern Africa IEC 62196 connector ecosystem; GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets. Confirm whether the Botswana deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。博茨瓦纳遵循南部非洲IEC 62196接口体系；GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认博茨瓦纳部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。波札那遵循南部非洲IEC 62196接口體系；GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認波札那部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。
